Not attempted

Select the word that is FARTHEST in meaning to the bold word in capital letters.
OBLIGATORY

Solution

The word "OBLIGATORY" means something that is required or necessary. The opposite of this would be something that is voluntary, meaning done of one's own free will.

Q33 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following case hardening process, result in a change in the composition of a steel component?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(b, c, d)
• In carburizing, additional carbon is added to steel.
• In cyaniding, steel is put in cyanide bath and CN group is added and later atomic C diffuses into steel, increasing the composition of carbon in steel.
• In Nitriding, steel is heated in atmosphere of NH3 gas. Later NH3 is dissociated in N and H2 and atomic N diffuses into steel, making a case containing the alloy nitrides.

Not attempted

Which of the following method(s) is/are used for compaction of powder in powder metallurgy?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, b, c, d)
Methods of compaction of powder:
• Using a punch and a die
• By rolling
• By extrusion
• By Injection moulding
• By Isostatic pressing
